steps.title: Match appositive punctuation
steps.content: The phrase the cellular organs that generate energy from light renames chloroplasts. Because the appositive closes with an em dash before reshuffled, it should open with a matching em dash.

steps.title: Reject mismatched marks
steps.content: Choice B opens the appositive with a comma but closes it with an em dash, creating mismatched punctuation. Choice C leaves the appositive without opening punctuation. Choice D uses a semicolon, which cannot introduce an appositive. The answer is A.
